# Phase 12 — stall modifier post-pass. Exercises:
#   - drive-line stall=<kind> form (a stall-modifier line)
#   - Suppressed kind propagating through the pipeline and dropping
#     stalls from the total_stalls count
#   - SVG renderer skipping Suppressed stalls (visual verification via
#     the snapshot)

polygon outer
(0,0)
(240,0)
(240,160)
(0,160)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(240,160), area 38400

set stall-angle=90
----

# Horizontal suppression line at mid-height of the lot. Should clear
# stalls along both sides of the interior aisle that runs east-west.
drive-line stall=suppressed
(40,80)
(200,80)
----
drive-line (40,80) -> (200,80) stall=suppressed

generate
----
total_stalls: 58
faces: 5 (boundary: 1, interior: 4)
graph: 10 vertices, 13 edges (perimeter: 10, interior: 3)
regions: 1
